summary: api/version und service-conflicts stabil; backup/list weiterhin intermittierend timeout trotz read-only/timeouts/thread-offload
notes: List endpoint refactored to read-only validation and non-recursive scan.
List validation and scan wrapped in asyncio.to_thread + asyncio.wait_for with structured backup.list_timeout.
Timeout path for /media deterministic when request completes: backup.path_invalid + STORAGE-PROTECTION-005.
Live environment still shows intermittent request hangs before handler returns for list endpoint.
